Test Case Name: TC01_Verify New Business with Property and Inland Marine LOB Combination_Middle Market_New Business_LOB Combination
Description: The objective of this test case is to validate that a New Business submission can be created with Property and Inland Marine LOBs combined and processed through pricing and binding
Action: 1. Navigate to Phoenix submission creation screen
Expected Result: 1. User should be able to view the submission creation screen with all required fields

Action: 2. Create a Domestic submission with Property and Inland Marine LOBs selected
Expected Result: 2. User should be able to create a submission successfully with both LOBs selected

Action: 3. Navigate to Line selection screen and verify both LOBs are listed
Expected Result: 3. User should see Property and Inland Marine in the selected LOBs list

Action: 4. Navigate to Property screen and fill all mandatory fields
Expected Result: 4. User should be able to complete Property LOB with all required information

Action: 5. Navigate to Inland Marine screen and fill all mandatory fields
Expected Result: 5. User should be able to complete Inland Marine LOB with all required information

Action: 6. Price the submission and approve underwriter rules
Expected Result: 6. System should price the submission successfully with both LOBs

Action: 7. Generate Quote and validate the quote document
Expected Result: 7. Quote document should include both Property and Inland Marine LOBs

Action: 8. Bind the policy and validate the binder document
Expected Result: 8. Binder document should reflect both LOBs in the binding

Action: 9. Issue the policy and validate all forms are correctly attached
Expected Result: 9. Policy should be issued with forms for both Property and Inland Marine LOBs

Description: The objective of this test case is to validate that multiple LOB combinations work correctly with Produced scope
Action: 1. Navigate to Phoenix submission creation screen
Expected Result: 1. User should be able to view the submission creation screen

Action: 2. Create a Produced scope submission with Property and Inland Marine LOBs
Expected Result: 2. User should be able to select Produced scope and multiple LOBs

Action: 3. Navigate to Line selection screen
Expected Result: 3. Fac indicator should default to Reinsurance for Produced scope

Action: 4. Verify both LOBs are available for Produced submission
Expected Result: 4. Property and Inland Marine should be selectable

Action: 5. Complete Property LOB configuration
Expected Result: 5. Property should be configured with Produced scope details

Action: 6. Complete Inland Marine LOB configuration
Expected Result: 6. Inland Marine should be configured with Produced scope details

Action: 7. Price the Produced submission with both LOBs
Expected Result: 7. System should price with Produced scope indicator

Action: 8. Generate Quote for Produced scope submission
Expected Result: 8. Quote should reflect Produced scope and both LOBs

Action: 9. Bind the Produced scope submission
Expected Result: 9. Binder should include Produced scope reinsurance details with both LOBs
